title: rubus pauanus
intro: Rubus pauanus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Bramble, is a type of shrub that belongs to the Rosaceae family and is native to the Himalayan region. The medicinal properties of Rubus pauanus lie in its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is rich in vitamins and minerals, and its health benefits include improving cardiovascular health, reducing the risk of certain cancers, and supporting the immune system. Rubus pauanus can be prepared into various herbal products, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat digestive issues and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
